title: [Snyk Code] Jinja auto-escape is set to false.
description:
## Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Project:** `AnthusAI/Plexus`

**Location:** line 195, column 36 to line 195, column 44
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-79
### Snippet (plexus/scores/nodes/MultiClassClassifier.py:193-197)
```
 193 |                         
 194 |                         # Format the explanation message using Jinja2 template
 195 |                         template = Template(self.parameters.explanation_message)
 196 |                         formatted_explanation_message = template.render(**template_state)
 197 |                         
```

**Issue Key:** 3ea1f46d-3ff8-4a52-b09e-2b1f491c4057

### Details

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.
